description: Light page with research paragraph, large pull quote, and decorative node network graphic

elements.description: Introductory or contextual paragraph about the research
Large, impactful quote or data highlight
Decorative node network rising from bottom-left to top-right

research_paragraph.description: Context paragraph introducing or explaining the research finding

pull_quote.description: Key insight or data-driven statement to highlight
pull_quote.example: Quote or snippet from data that drives idea of the report

usage_notes: Use to create visual breathing room between data-heavy sections
Pull quote should be the most compelling or surprising finding
Node network provides visual interest without competing with text
Good for section transitions or before conclusions
